users.description: User profiles synced from Firebase Authentication upon registration/login.

uid.description: Unique identifier matching the Firebase Auth UID

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created in Firestore

listingsCount.description: Denormalized counter of active listings created by the user

exchangesCount.description: Denormalized counter of successful exchanges completed by the user

listings.description: Items posted by users to trade for beer or beverages.

description.description: Detailed description of the item being offered

beerPrice.description: Price in terms of beer units (integer or decimal)

beerUnit.description: Unit of beverage used as currency

images.description: URLs of uploaded images in Firebase Storage (max 10)

sellerId.description: Reference UID to the seller in the 'users' collection

sellerName.description: Denormalized display name of the seller to avoid extra reads

sellerPhotoURL.description: Denormalized profile photo URL of the seller to avoid extra reads

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the listing was published

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the listing was last updated

exchanges.description: Historical log of swap transactions when an item status transitions to 'exchanged'.

listingId.description: Reference ID to the listing traded

listingTitle.description: Denormalized title of the traded item for reporting

buyerId.description: UID of the buyer (initiating the swap)

status.description: Status of the trade history record

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was completed
